CREATE TABLE ssl_info (id UInt32, cert_name String, cert_value String);
SELECT * FROM ssl_info WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM ssl_info WHERE cert_name = 'issuer') LIMIT 1;
SELECT cert_name, cert_value FROM ssl_info WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM ssl_info);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT showCertificate() AS cert_info) AS temp;
CREATE TABLE nested_test AS (SELECT showCertificate() AS cert_info) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT cert_info FROM nested_test WHERE cert_info['issuer'] = 'Let's Encrypt';
SELECT showCertificate(), (SELECT MAX(valid_to) FROM ssl_info) FROM ssl_info;
SELECT showCertificate() WHERE 1 = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ssl_info WHERE cert_value LIKE '%example.com%');
SELECT showCertificate(), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ssl_info) FROM ssl_info WHERE cert_name = 'subject';
CREATE TABLE temp_info AS SELECT * FROM ssl_info WHERE valid_to > now();
SELECT showCertificate(), (SELECT AVG(id) FROM temp_info) FROM temp_info;
